title: Ace Site Config
description: The structured specification emitted by the generator and rendered by @ace/template. Version 0.1.

version.description: Schema version. Bumped on breaking changes.

siteId.description: Unique slug for this generated site. Used as localStorage namespace. Lowercase, hyphenated. Generator should derive from course code + date.

title.description: Site title shown in header and <title>

section.description: A section has EITHER flat widgets or grouped subtopics, not both. Subtopics produce `<h3 id>` anchors and become sidebar sub-links.

summary.description: 1-2 sentence orientation shown at the top of the section

widgets.description: Flat widget list. Use this OR subtopics, not both. Max 12.

subtopics.description: Grouped widget lists. Each subtopic gets its own h3 anchor + sidebar sub-link.

id.description: URL-safe anchor id. Typically prefixed by section id (e.g. 'act-electrostatic').

summary.description: 1-line subtopic orientation, shown under the h3

type.description: Widget type — must match a key in the @ace/components registry

id.description: Stable per-widget id used as localStorage key suffix

props.description: Widget-specific props. Validated at mount time against the widget's own schema.
